title: OpenConnect instability deep-dive for Keenetic Peak client

checklist.step: Collect project context and current OpenConnect server configuration
Extract Keenetic CLI diagnostics relevant to OpenConnect
Form root-cause hypotheses and map to observable evidence
Run server-side log/config validation and timing checks
Prepare Keenetic-side debug command sequence and interpretation guide
Define mitigation plan with low-risk incremental changes
Verification: run reproducible checks and capture expected healthy signals
Documentation update with final diagnostic report
Security/policy gate: confirm no unsafe config regressions
Map panel access path and firewall/hardening interactions
Prepare server-side log and restart-correlation runbook
Verification: reproducible checks and healthy signals
